LanguageData.MSSFP_PonderingOrbAstroNav_StatExplain: Pondering Orb astrogation ({0}): persona-modelled substrate-current solver projects multi-vector flight envelope beyond unaided thrust ceiling: +{1} tiles
LanguageData.MSSFP_PonderingOrbCooldownReduced: {0} pre-spooled coil dampers during burn — capacitor recharge window contracted.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_HoleThroughPlanet_Text: While plotting the route, {0} hallucinated a hole straight through the planet and flew {1} into the descent far too hard. The ship slammed into the ground on arrival. Nothing was destroyed, but buildings across the gravship took heavy damage — and the crew got thrown around.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_DivideByZero_Text: Mid-jump, {0} divided by zero and the route-calculation core hard-faulted. The Pondering Orb's gravship assistance is offline until the persona finishes rebooting. Range and cooldown bonuses are suspended in the meantime.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_DebrisField_Msg: {0} routed {1} through a debris field — minor hull damage, and some scrap came aboard.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_JumpNausea_Text: {0} chose a time-dilated shortcut for {1}. It saved fuel, but the prolonged deceleration left the whole crew queasy. The effect will fade.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_GhostInTheMachine_Msg: For a moment during {1}'s jump, {0}'s hallucination seemed to bleed into reality...
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_GravityHiccup_Msg: A gravitic hiccup as {1} touched down knocked the crew off their feet.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_ExistentialBroadcast_Text: Somewhere in the jump math, {0} pondered a little too deeply and broadcast its dread across {1}. The crew felt it. They'll shake it off.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_HallucinatedShortcut_Text: {0} hallucinated a shortcut that had no business working — and it worked. {1}'s grav engine settled with no cooldown at all. It's ready to launch again immediately.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_FlashOfInsight_Text: While idling between burns, {0} solved a problem the colony had been chewing on. The insight was passed along on arrival.
LanguageData.MSSFP_OrbEvent_FlawlessBurn_Msg: {0} flew {1} flawlessly — fuel recovered and a smooth ride for the crew.
